posts.title: BCC Meeting Wednesday April 9th 2031: Climate Action + Guest Speaker
posts.content:
Our next meeting is on Wednesday, April 9th, 2031 at 6:30 pm.

See you at Partners in Print, 402 Cedar St (6:30pm as usual) and thanks to them for hosting us!

posts.title: BCC Meeting Wednesday March 11th 2026: SDOT City Arborist + Elliott/Western Ave Mobility Project
posts.content:
The Belltown Community Council welcomes Seattle’s Department of Transportation (SDOT).

See you at Partners in Print, 402 Cedar St (6:30pm as usual) and thanks to them for hosting us!

posts.title: No meeting October 2025
posts.content: We’re skipping the October meeting. See you all in November!

posts.title: Belltown Mural Festival 2025
posts.content: The Belltown Mural Festival returns, with activities every day from August 5th-10th!

posts.title: BCC Meeting Wednesday July 9th 2025: CM/President Sara Nelson + Partners in Print
posts.content:
Our next meeting is on Wednesday, July 9th, 2025 at 6:30 pm.

See you all at Partners in Print, at 402 Cedar St. Many thanks to them for hosting us!
